topic: used oak barrels, oxygen transfer, and limited oak flavour
trigger_keywords: permite oxigenación sin aporte significativo de sabor

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine is matured in oak barrels that have already held wine for one or more cycles.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Previous use has depleted much of the readily extractable oak flavour, but the vessel still permits slow oxygen transfer through the wood.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine gains the textural and maturation effects of controlled oxygenation with much less new-oak aroma or flavour.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine gains the textural and maturation effects of controlled oxygenation with much less new-oak aroma or flavour.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
